summary: iOS 🟥 INTERMITTENT | DFU/Update all not always works properly
scenario: "Update All" DFU fails intermittently when headset was connected to app during PC downgrade, leaving headset outdated with no retry option until app restart
description_clean: Intermittent issue where "Update All" (DFU) does not always work properly. Steps: Connect headset to app, connect headset to PC via cable, downgrade headset via PC with PTT, unplug headset from PC, downgrade Charge Stand via PC, keep Charge Stand plugged to PC, place headset on Charge Stand, wait for both components to appear in Software tab, tap Update All. Observed: DFU sometimes fails. After closing and returning to Device Settings > Software tab, there is no option to start the update again. After restarting the app, the Charge Stand shows as up to date while the headset remains outdated. Expected: DFU should work properly. Note: Issue only reproducible if headset was connected to the app while being downgraded via PC.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect the headset to the app (Home screen).
2. Connect the headset to a PC via USB cable.
3. Using Poly Lens (PTT) on the PC, downgrade the headset firmware.
4. Unplug the headset from the PC.
5. Using Poly Lens (PTT) on the PC, downgrade the Charge Stand firmware.
6. Keep the Charge Stand plugged into the PC via USB.
7. Place the headset on the Charge Stand.
8. In the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software tab.
9. Wait for both the headset and Charge Stand to appear in the Software tab.
10. Tap "Update All" to initiate the DFU process.
11. Observe whether the DFU completes successfully or fails.
12. If DFU fails, close the Device Settings screen and return to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software tab.
13. Check if there is an option to start the update again.
14. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
15. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software tab and observe the firmware status of the headset and Charge Stand.
expected: DFU should complete successfully. After a failed DFU, the Software tab should still show the option to update. After restarting the app, both the headset and Charge Stand should reflect their correct firmware versions, and the headset should still show as outdated with an update option available.
actual: DFU sometimes fails. After closing and returning to Device Settings > Software tab, there is no option to start the update again. After restarting the app, the Charge Stand shows as up to date while the headset remains outdated.
